epg.title: Mr Bean
epg.description:
| +TP | Series |

Mr Bean rushes to his exam only to find out he's studied the wrong subject.

epg.title: The Return of Mr Bean
epg.description:
| +TP | Series |

Mr Bean wants to give a busker some money until he realises he has no change.

epg.title: The Curse of Mr Bean
epg.description:
| +TP | Series |

Mr Bean goes to a swimming pool but finds himself terrified of the high diving board.

epg.title: Mr Bean goes to Town
epg.description:
| +TP | Series |

Mr Bean buys a portable television but can't get it to work properly.

epg.title: The Trouble with Mr Bean
epg.description:
| +TP | Series |

Mr Bean rushes to the dentist's office after oversleeping.

epg.title: Mr Bean Rides Again
epg.description:
| +TP | Series |

Mr Bean resuscitates a heart attack victim at the bus stop.

epg.title: Merry Christmas Mr Bean
epg.description:
| +TP | Series |

Mr Bean goes Christmas shopping, conducts a Salvation Army band.

epg.title: Mr Bean in Room 426
epg.description:
| +TP | Series |

Mr Bean treats himself to a weekend at a posh hotel.

epg.title: Mind the Baby, Mr Bean
epg.description:
| +TP | Series |

Mr Bean goes to the funfair.

epg.title: Do it Yourself Mr Bean
epg.description:
| +TP | Series |

Mr Bean hosts a New Year's Eve party.

epg.title: Bakc to School Mr Bean
epg.description:
| +TP | Series |

Mr Bean goes back to school.

epg.title: Tee Off, Mr Bean
epg.description:
| +TP | Series |

Mr Bean goes to the laundrette where he loses his trousers once more.

epg.title: Good Night Mr Bean
epg.description:
| +TP | Series |

Mr Bean has a hard time waiting his turn at the hospital.

epg.title: Hair by Mr Bean of London
epg.description:
| +TP | Series |

Mr Bean has a grand day at the hairdresser's.
